steps.t: Viznak can be found in his hideout. You should talk to Viznak when you are ready to go.
Seregost can be found at the northern end of Agarnaith. You should survey locations of Seregost's walls. If Viznak wanders off, you can call him back …
Somewhere along Seregost's walls should be a suitable location for the climb. You should find a suitable location for Viznak to climb up. If Viznak wa…
